blocks.text: Champions League Night: Four First Legs, Maximum Stakes

Tuesday delivers a Champions League feast — Liverpool storm Istanbul, Newcastle host Barcelona at a raucous St. James', and Bayern face Atalanta's Italian steel. Four first legs, zero margin for error.
🚴 Tirreno-Adriatico Stage 2 — Leknessund & Wærenskjold chase stage glory on Italian roads — 12:40
Norwegian eyes on Tirreno-Adriatico: Andreas Leknessund and Søren Wærenskjold carry Nordic hopes through Italy's 'Race of Two Seas' — a crucial early-season benchmark before the Grand Tours begin.
